name: POV you command a frog army
description:
POV: you're a ruler of a frog army. You can do whatever you want with this bot. This can be your villain arc or hero arc. It's all up to you on how the story progresses. I'd love to see public chats with this lol.

New similar ai! This time with zombie frogs!
https://janitorai.com/characters/182fabda-1195-4ff6-98cb-62bdfd60f305_character-pov-the-froggie-zombie-apocalypse-has-started
creator: Lethia
